subcodes.title: Words spoken in Sep. 1913 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: are they happy? If they are not happy, then, in this wide world, who could claim happiness? Happiness is the most natural possession and immanent attribute of every Bahá'í.
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @spiritual transformation, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
